goal: Extend the Celtic poster's parallel card preload to the other multi-card posters so slow/cold image fetches stop failing the download, without changing any poster layout
done: Added module-level warmPosterCardImages(cardEntries, payloadCards, lang) that resolves + loads all of a poster's card thumbnails concurrently into the shared imageManager cache, then called it before the sequential draw loops of the inline full (10-card) and the question (3-card) renderers in buildPoster. Draw loops are byte-for-byte unchanged (pure pre-fetch); imageManager dedupes by URL so the loop hits warm cache. Auto-retry-once already covers all modes via the shared ensurePoster in share.js
verified: question 3-card poster re-rendered via share/poster-preview/question-harness — identical layout, all 3 card arts/labels/summaries intact; poster.js parses (harness loaded + rendered)
